syncHint: Sync your opening and tactics progress across devices.

data.title: Your data
data.note: Everything stored for this account, as JSON — or erased for good. See the <policyLink>Privacy Policy</policyLink>.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this account?
deleteDialog.body: This permanently erases {{username}} from Chesser's servers: your sign-in, synced progress, saved games, sharing settings, leaderboard entries and friends. Your data in this browser is cleared too. There is no undo.
deleteDialog.error: Could not delete the account — try again.
